blended.narrative: Ski Granby Ranch is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,961 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.1" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 44.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 42".
